ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter who submitted the system */,
  "system_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the system configuration */,
  "constraint" TEXT /* Constraint information for the system */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Run-specific notes for the system */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system version */,
  "language_pair" TEXT /* Language pair for the system (e.g., en-de) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used to develop the system (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* Input format the system can handle (e.g., text, XML) */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Output format the system generates (e.g., text, XML) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "training_data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the training data in terms of number of sentences or words */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the system is released */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the system's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES system_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the submitter belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the submitter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the submitter */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the submitter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submitter (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the metric belongs to */,
  "bleu" REAL /* BLEU score */,
  "bleu_cased" REAL /* BLEU-cased score */,
  "ter" REAL /* TER score */,
  "beer" REAL /* BEER score */,
  "charactter" REAL /* CharactTER score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who performed the evaluation */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the metrics */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES system_evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Detailed configuration notes for the system */,
  "training_steps" INTEGER /* Number of training steps or epochs */,
  "model_size" INTEGER /* Size of the model in terms of parameters */,
  "inference_time" TEXT /* Average inference time for a single translation */,
  "hardware_requirements" TEXT /* Hardware requirements for running the system */,
  "software_requirements" TEXT /* Software requirements for running the system */,
  "api_endpoints" TEXT /* API endpoints for accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_notes" (
  "run_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run note entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the run note belongs to */,
  "run_details" TEXT /* Detailed run notes for the system submission */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was performed */,
  "run_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the run */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was performed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_notes_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer, more detailed description of the criterion */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the criterion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the criterion was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being evaluated */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation criterion */,
  "score" REAL /* Score for the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_evaluations_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_evaluations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the evaluator belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the evaluator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the evaluator was added to the system */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last evaluation performed by the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_count" INTEGER /* Number of evaluations performed by the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation report */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the report belongs to */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the evaluation report */,
  "report_file_size" REAL /* Size of the evaluation report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_report_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system version */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the system */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., released, deprecated) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_versions_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system with the dependency */,
  "dependent_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent system */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., library, data source) */,
  "dependency_details" TEXT /* Details about the dependency */,
  "dependency_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependent system */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., required, optional) */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Installation instructions for the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_dependencies_dependent_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_dependencies_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or feedback */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., feedback, question, suggestion) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for threaded discussions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_comments_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES system_comments ("comment_id")
)
